name: Regency Adventure | The Season
description:
open scenario

London, 1815: The Season has begun, and the marriage mart is in full swing. Navigate glittering ballrooms where one wrong step means ruin and the right dance partner could change everything. Charm the patronesses of Almack's, survive the gossip mills, dodge fortune hunters (or become one), and decide whether to marry for duty or gamble everything on love. Behind elegant facades, families scheme, fortunes hang in the balance, and reputations can be destroyed with a whisper. Three months to secure your future. Every ball, every morning call, every promenade in Hyde Park could make or break you. Welcome to the ton.

Hi folks! I've had this itching in the back of my brain for about the last four or five days.

Just like in my Prehistoric Adventure and Viking Adventure, there are no named NPC built into this world so each chat is a completely different story!

Want to access my bots early? Follow me on Saucepan

Going forward, bots will be posted over there before JAI. Sometimes by a lot of time, sometimes by a little. I also have Saucepan exclusive bots that can't be found anywhere else.

Need a referral? Check out my profile! My referral link is in my bio.
creator: kittylace
